description: Style Noteremanika combines edgy style, figure flattering cuts and lean fits in each and every one of its creations. This green tank top is the perfect stylish casual wear. Wear it with well fitted shorts and flip flops for a day out in the sun.Product Details Green  top with a round neckline, has a flap at the neckline to give a bunched up look, short sleeves with a gathered detail and flaring tucks from the flap  Material and CareViscose Gentle machine wash Do not bleach and flat dry Use cold iron  Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
